---
title: "zbtb20_wtvko_snrnaseq_overlap"
author: "G Sejourne"
date: "2026-02-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(dplyr)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
#read in P28 CUT&RUN data
union_peaks <- read.table("union_promoters_TSS.bed")

#read in P28 snRNAseq data
wilcox_neun_neg <- read.csv('./data/neun_neg_Wilcoxon_results_260120.csv')

wt.gene.list <- read.csv('wt.gene.list.csv')
wt.gene.list <- wt.gene.list[,2]
ko.gene.list <- read.csv('ko.gene.list.csv')
ko.gene.list <- ko.gene.list[,2]
intersect.gene.list <- read.csv('intersect.gene.list.csv')
intersect.gene.list <- intersect.gene.list[,2]
```

```{r}
# combine to single dataframe
union_peaks <- union_peaks$V4

rownames(wilcox_neun_neg) <- wilcox_neun_neg$KO_n
wilcox_neun_neg <- subset(wilcox_neun_neg, select = c(KO_n, KO_l, KO_p) )
colnames(wilcox_neun_neg) = c('gene', 'logFC_rna', 'pval_rna')

```


```{r, echo=FALSE}
res_combined <- wilcox_neun_neg %>%
  mutate(
    deg     = pval_rna < 0.05 & (abs(logFC_rna) > 0.3219),
    
    zbtb20 = if_else((gene %in% union_peaks), TRUE, FALSE),

    direction_deg = case_when(
      pval_rna < 0.05 & logFC_rna > 0.3219 ~ "Up",
      pval_rna < 0.05 & logFC_rna < -0.3219 ~ "Down" 
    ),
    peakset = case_when(
      gene %in% wt.gene.list ~ 'wt_unique',
      gene %in% ko.gene.list ~ 'ko_unique',
      gene %in% intersect.gene.list ~ 'intersect'
    ),
    cpg = gene %in% union_cpg$gene_name
  )
print(res_combined)
write.csv(res_combined, './data/cutrun_rnaseq_degs.csv')
```

```{r}
peakset_summary <- res_combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(peakset)) %>% 
  group_by(peakset) %>%
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    deg = sum(deg, na.rm = TRUE),
    unchanged = total - deg,
    up = sum(direction_deg == "Up", na.rm = TRUE),
    down = sum(direction_deg == "Down", na.rm = TRUE),
    percent_deg = 100 * deg / total,
    percent_up = 100 * up / total,
    percent_down = 100 * down / total,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

bound_summary <- res_combined %>%
  filter(zbtb20 == TRUE) %>% 
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    deg = sum(deg, na.rm = TRUE),
    unchanged = total - deg,
    up = sum(direction_deg == "Up", na.rm = TRUE),
    down = sum(direction_deg == "Down", na.rm = TRUE),
    percent_deg = 100 * deg / total,
    percent_up = 100 * up / total,
    percent_down = 100 * down / total,
    .groups = "drop",
    peakset = "bound"
  )

overall_summary <- res_combined %>%
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    deg = sum(deg, na.rm = TRUE),
    unchanged = total - deg,
    up = sum(direction_deg == "Up", na.rm = TRUE),
    down = sum(direction_deg == "Down", na.rm = TRUE),
    percent_deg = 100 * deg / total,
    percent_up = 100 * up / total,
    percent_down = 100 * down / total,
    peakset = "overall"
  )

deg_summary <- bind_rows(overall_summary, bound_summary, peakset_summary)
deg_summary <- deg_summary %>% rename(group = peakset)
print(deg_summary)

write.csv(deg_summary, './data/prop_table_deg_by_peakset.csv')
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
cpg_summary <- res_combined  %>%
  filter(zbtb20 == TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(cpg) %>%
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    deg = sum(deg, na.rm = TRUE),
    unchanged = total - deg,
    up = sum(direction_deg == "Up", na.rm = TRUE),
    down = sum(direction_deg == "Down", na.rm = TRUE),
    percent_deg = 100 * deg / total,
    percent_up = 100 * up / total,
    percent_down = 100 * down / total,
    group = if_else(dplyr::first(cpg), "cpg", "non_cpg"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

bound_summary <- res_combined %>%
  filter(zbtb20 == TRUE) %>% 
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    deg = sum(deg, na.rm = TRUE),
    unchanged = total - deg,
    up = sum(direction_deg == "Up", na.rm = TRUE),
    down = sum(direction_deg == "Down", na.rm = TRUE),
    percent_deg = 100 * deg / total,
    percent_up = 100 * up / total,
    percent_down = 100 * down / total,
    .groups = "drop",
    group = "bound"
  )


overall_summary <- res_combined %>%
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    deg = sum(deg, na.rm = TRUE),
    unchanged = total - deg,
    up = sum(direction_deg == "Up", na.rm = TRUE),
    down = sum(direction_deg == "Down", na.rm = TRUE),
    percent_deg = 100 * deg / total,
    percent_up = 100 * up / total,
    percent_down = 100 * down / total,
    group = "overall",
  )

deg_summary <- bind_rows(overall_summary, bound_summary, cpg_summary)
deg_summary<- select(deg_summary, -c("cpg"))

print(deg_summary)

write.csv(deg_summary, './data/prop_table_deg_by_cpg.csv')
```

```{r}
cpg_summary <- res_combined  %>%
  filter(zbtb20 == TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(cpg) %>%
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    wt = sum(peakset == "wt_unique", na.rm = TRUE),
    ko = sum(peakset == "ko_unique", na.rm = TRUE),
    intersect = sum(peakset == "intersect", na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_wt = 100 * wt / total,
    pct_ko = 100 * ko / total,
    pct_intersect = 100 * intersect / total,
    group = if_else(dplyr::first(cpg), "cpg", "non_cpg"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

bound_summary <- res_combined %>%
  filter(zbtb20 == TRUE) %>% 
  summarise(
   total = n(),
    wt = sum(peakset == "wt_unique", na.rm = TRUE),
    ko = sum(peakset == "ko_unique", na.rm = TRUE),
    intersect = sum(peakset == "intersect", na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_wt = 100 * wt / total,
    pct_ko = 100 * ko / total,
    pct_intersect = 100 * intersect / total,
    .groups = "drop",
    group = "bound"
  )


deg_summary <- bind_rows(bound_summary, cpg_summary)
deg_summary<- select(deg_summary, -c("cpg"))

print(deg_summary)

write.csv(deg_summary, './data/prop_table_cpg_by_peakset.csv')
```
